songs.title: Down
feed: “Down” by blink-182 returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 3rd nonconsecutive week at the top.
“Down” by blink-182 is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 11,800 sales units.
“Down” by blink-182 is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 67,475,100 streams units.
“Down” by blink-182 is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 332,661 total units.

songs.title: The Rock Show
songs.album: Take Off Your Pants and Jacket
feed: “The Rock Show” by blink-182 reenters Personal Hot 100 at #4.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 144,191,970 airplay units.
